item.title: Prince William Questioned About Ex-Prince Andrew and Epstein on Royal Tour After Breaking His Silence
item.description: The Prince of Wales faced more public questioning about his uncle during his visit to Saudi Arabia

item.title: Hailey Bieber Is Back with Another Skin-Baring Campaign as Face of DKNY (Exclusive Video)
item.description: The brand tapped Hailey last year to front her first campaign

item.title: Demi Lovato Cancels 5 Tour Dates to 'Protect My Health': 'I Am So Sorry to Those Who Planned to Be There'
item.description: "While starting to prepare for the tour, I realized that I have overextended what may be possible," said Lovato of her upcoming It's Not That Deep Tou...

item.title: Meghan Trainor Celebrates '3 Weeks of Loving Mikey' as She Shares Adorable New Video of Her Baby Girl
item.description: The "Still Don't Care" singer shares her daughter and sons Riley and Barry with husband Daryl Sabara

item.title: Dick Van Dyke 'Blown Away' to Receive Replica of “Chitty Chitty Bang Bang” Car (Exclusive)
item.description: The classic children’s movie debuted in 1968
